question_text: A microwave oven has a power rating of 900 W. It runs for 120 seconds to heat a meal. Calculate the energy transferred by the microwave. Give your answer in joules.
explanation: Using P = E/t, we rearrange to E = P × t. Energy = 900 W × 120 s = 108,000 J. This shows how power rating and time of use determine total energy consumed.
